main_functions.description: User can create an account using email and password.

sub_functions.description: Ensure that the email provided during registration is unique across all accounts.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that registration is rejected with an appropriate error when an email already exists in the system.
Verify that email uniqueness is enforced considering case sensitivity, leading/trailing spaces, and Unicode normalization.

sub_functions.description: Ensure that the password meets the minimum and maximum length requirements.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that registration is rejected when password is shorter than 8 characters, and succeeds when password is exactly 8 characters.
Verify that registration is rejected when password is longer than 12 characters, and succeeds when password is exactly 12 characters.
Verify that registration succeeds for passwords with length between 9 and 11 characters inclusive.

sub_functions.description: Ensure that appropriate error messages and feedback are provided for validation failures during registration.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that a clear and specific error message is displayed when attempting to register with an already used email.
Verify that clear and specific error messages are displayed when password does not meet length requirements.

main_functions.description: User must verify their email address before they are allowed to log in for the first time.

sub_functions.description: Ensure that the email verification mechanism (sending, resending, and verifying) functions correctly.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that a verification email is sent to the user's email address upon successful account creation.
Verify that the user can successfully verify their email using the provided mechanism (e.g., link or code).
Verify that the user can request a new verification email if the original is not received or expired.

sub_functions.description: Ensure that a user cannot log in without having verified their email address.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that login is denied for a user who has not yet verified their email.
Verify that login is allowed after successful email verification.
